# Robots.txt for Kaari Marketplace
# SECURITY: Disallow sensitive paths

# Allow public content
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /order-confirmation/
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /order-confirmation/
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

# Block all other bots from sensitive areas
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /order-confirmation/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /dummy-payment
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.xml$

# SECURITY: Disallow any paths that might contain user data
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /orders
Disallow: /settings

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://kaarihandmade.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay for server resources
Crawl-delay: 1
